name: Peanut Butter Sombreros
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C). Place sheets of foil on countertop for cooling cookies.
2. In a large bowl, combine brown sugar, peanut butter, Crisco shortening, milk, and vanilla. Beat at medium speed of electric mixer until well blended. Add egg. Beat just until blended.
3. In another bowl, combine flour, baking soda, and salt. Add to creamed mixture on low speed. Mix just until blended.
4. Form dough into 1-inch (2.5 cm) balls. Roll in granulated sugar. Place 2 inches (5 cm) apart on ungreased baking sheets.
5. Bake one baking sheet at a time at 375°F (190°C) for 6 minutes. Press chocolate pieces into center of each cookie. Return to oven. Bake 3 more minutes. Do not overbake. Cool 2 minutes on baking sheet. Remove cookies to foil to cool completely.
Makes: About 4 dozen cookies
